query:
SELECT externalId, connectionId, serviceId, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, planName, status, locationAddress, supplierAccount, phoneNumber, monthlyCost
FROM services 
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra'
LIMIT 15;
